context: Audit run BEFORE the close-out batch lands. Recorded state lets future sessions tell what shipped in PR #120 + #121 vs. what this PR adds.

1_organization_schema_component.rationale: Canonical organizationSchema() in src/data/author.ts already emits @type Organization with @id, address (Rocklin CA), email, foundingDate 2025, alternateName, logo, founder via @id ref. Emitted from src/app/page.tsx:183 and src/app/about/page.tsx:99. Creating a duplicate component mounted in layout.tsx would render two Organization JSON-LD blocks per page and confuse Google's Knowledge Graph.

AUTHOR.bio: zero live consumers as of PR #121 merge; safe to update

real_gaps_to_close_in_this_pr: Photo path in src/app/about/page.tsx line 135 points at /images/authors/eugen-manoli.jpg which does not exist. Ships a broken <Image> in production. Fix: point at /images/eugen-author.jpg (existing file) and drop the TODO[asset] marker.
AUTHOR.bio in src/data/author.ts is 73 words third-person. Eugen approved a canonical 153-word first-person bio. Update the field; zero live consumers means no other surface changes.
spec_items_already_shipped_in_pr_120_or_: Eugen's canonical Block 1 founder bio (153 words) hardcoded in /about Founder section
Eugen's canonical Block 2 origin story (196 words) hardcoded in /about Why-this-directory-exists section
Eugen's canonical Block 3 monetization disclosure (96 words) hardcoded in /about How-we-make-money section
Block 4 email-only contact section (single paragraph, no address / hours / response card)
Address + email + foundingDate + alternateName already in canonical organizationSchema()
operator @type switched from ProfessionalService to LocalBusiness
AdSense disclosure + DART + opt-out links in /privacy
AdSlot null-in-prod kill switch via NEXT_PUBLIC_ADS_ENABLED
